reviews.review_description: A lovely game about dwarfs digging holes, if it have coop it be perfect!

Can’t believe there aren’t more reviews on this! It’s been played on YouTube a bit!

Well done developers! Excellent game! Love the digging and beer drinking!!! 

Making a bigger hole to head down in! 

See ya if I make it back!!! 👍

reviews.review_title: This game is super fun and satisfying
reviews.review_description: Every time I want to play but don’t know what to play i play this game it’s also super funny the voice acting is awesome. Overall an amazing game
